nasb.text: Then the king said to the wise men who understood the times—for it was the custom of the king so to speak before all who knew law and justice

esv.text: Then the king said to the wise men who knew the times (for this was the king’s procedure toward all who were versed in law and judgment,

cnv.text: 王就諮詢通達時務的哲士；因為當時按照王的常規，王要處理一事，必先問問面前所有精通法令和審斷的朝臣。

ccb.text: 王有事习惯征求通晓律例和法则之人的意见，于是他去问精通时务的哲士。
